tts.title: Text to Speech
tts.processingMessage: Your audio is being generated, please wait...
tts.generatingTip: This may take a few seconds. You can close this and check later in Generation History.
tts.successTip: Your audio is ready! You can download or play it now.

input.placeholder: Enter your text here, and we will automatically identify and convert it to the corresponding speech.

greeting.label: Greeting
greeting.text: Hello! Nice to meet you. How are you doing today?

ebook.label: E-book
ebook.text: In a quiet little village, there lived a kind old man. Every day, he would sit under the big tree at the village entrance and tell ancient stories.

podcast.label: Podcast
podcast.text: Welcome to today's show. In this episode, we will explore the latest developments in artificial intelligence technology.

errors.selectTextAndVoice: Please enter text and select a voice
errors.invalidParams: Invalid parameters, please check your input
errors.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits, please upgrade or recharge
errors.unauthorized: Not logged in or session expired, please login again
errors.taskSubmitFailed: Failed to submit task, please try again
errors.taskNoId: Task submission failed, no task ID returned
errors.queryTaskFailed: Failed to query task status, please refresh the page
errors.unknownTaskStatus: Unknown task status, please try again
errors.TEXT_TOO_LONG: Text too long. Max length: {{maxLength}}, Current: {{currentLength}}

deleteDialog.title: Delete Speech Generation
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this speech generation? This action cannot be undone and the audio file will be permanently removed.
deleteDialog.deleteFailedAlert: Failed to delete record. Please try again.
